positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map design. Central subject is a stylized, abstract constellation of interconnected geometric shapes (stars, moons, comets, and planetary orbits) forming a recognizable but universal pattern, like a stylized labyrinth or zodiac wheel. The style should be highly detailed line art combined with solid, matte color blocks, reminiscent of Mid-Century Modern poster design. Use a palette of deep midnight blue, aged cream parchment, and metallic gold accents for the lines. The composition must be centered, scalable, and designed for high contrast on apparel fabric. Ensure clean, sharp edges and sophisticated negative space. Vector art aesthetic, seamless pattern potential, perfect for screen printing.
